allow: Bash(git remote -v 2>/dev/null; echo "---"; gh auth status 2>&1 | head -5)

Bash(git add .github/workflows/deploy.yml .gitignore index.html package.json package-lock.json tsconfig.json vite.config.ts vitest.config.ts src/ tests/ planning/ && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Phase 1: tactical combat prototype with hex grid, ECS, and Babylon.js

Battle Brothers-inspired mobile browser game foundation:
- Hex grid with pathfinding, line of sight, and field of view
- Entity Component System with 13 component types
- Turn-based combat with melee attacks, damage/armor resolution
- Simple enemy AI \(move toward and attack nearest\)
- Babylon.js rendering: hex tiles, unit discs, movement/attack overlays
- Touch input: tap to select, pan, pinch-zoom
- Babylon.GUI: action bar, turn order bar, unit info panel
- 46 unit tests for hex math, pathfinding, LoS, and combat
- GitHub Pages deployment via Actions workflow

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git status)
